fixes_applied.original_issue: Global error handler uses string matching on error messages for status codes — fragile, breaks if message text changes
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Replaced (err as any).name === 'NotFoundError' with instanceof checks for NotFoundError and ValidationError. Used typed status literal union (400|404|500) to eliminate the status as any cast.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Markdown storage uses `as any` to access TaskRow.sectionId and pass updates — indicates type model mismatch
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Removed both `as any` casts — TaskRow already has sectionId field and Partial<TaskRow> already accepts { sectionId: null }

fixes_applied.original_issue: Update call uses `as any` to pass parentId — suggests UpdateTaskInput type is incomplete
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Removed `as any` cast — UpdateTaskInput already includes parentId from CreateTaskInput.partial()

fixes_applied.original_issue: AI error classification accesses .status, .headers, .code via `as any` — no proper error type narrowing
fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added ProviderErrorShape interface and asProviderError() helper function that duck-types provider SDK errors with proper type checking. Replaced all 3 `as any` casts with structured extraction.

fixes_applied.original_issue: Undeclared projectName property added to TaskFilter via `as any` — creates shadow type contract

summary: Fixed 18 issues across 14 files. Key fixes: (1) CRITICAL: server.ts error handler now uses instanceof checks instead of fragile string matching; (2) CRITICAL: removed unnecessary `as any` casts in metadata-ops.ts and tasks.ts where types already supported the operations; (3) WARNING: added proper ProviderErrorShape interface to ai/errors.ts eliminating 3 `as any` casts; (4) WARNING: added projectName to TaskFilter type and permissions to StorePluginInfo type, removing `as any` casts in query-parser.ts and StorePluginCard.tsx; (5) WARNING: replaced 15 silent .catch(() => {}) with descriptive error logging across 8 files. Deferred 17 issues: test file creation (out of scope), ChatManager encapsulation (DX fixer), file decomposition (architectural), ErrorBoundary expansion (needs UI testing), third-party type declarations.
